subject: Ferroseed, a small round creature covered in metallic spines, perched in a rocky canyon setting
description: A small, roughly spherical creature densely covered in sharp metallic spines radiates outward in all directions. Its face peers out from the tangle of thorns — angular pale eyes set against a grey-green body. The creature is positioned in the center of the frame against warm ochre and tan rocky canyon walls, with a hint of open sky in the upper background. The overall silhouette reads as a living caltrop or sea-urchin analog, and the art captures a slightly menacing stillness despite the creature's compact size.
foreground: spiny round creature with metallic thorns, grey-green body
background: rocky canyon walls, warm tan and ochre stone
